texto: The first questions naturally raised by a person emerging from the fog of childhood are the same questions that led Aristotle and other great philosophers to think and write deeply on the subjects of first philosophy and ethics.
explicacao: Citação de Alan E. Johnson sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “The first questions naturally raised by a person emerging from the fog of childhood are the same …” articula reflexao, reason, reasoning em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reasoning.
